en.summary: Imam Ali (AS) declares that his faith and noble descent are identical to those of the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW). This statement was made in the context of defending his religious authority and familial connection to the Prophet, emphasizing that any disparagement of his religion or lineage is a direct assault on the Prophet’s own religion and lineage.

key_terms.دين: Din — religion, faith, the way of life one follows
key_terms.حسب: Hasab — noble descent, lineage, honor inherited through family
key_terms.تناول: Tanawala — to attack, disparage, speak ill of

en.seo_question: What did Imam Ali say about his religion and lineage in relation to the Prophet?

ur.summary: حضرت علی علیہ السلام نے فرمایا کہ ان کا دین اور ان کا نسب حضرت محمد صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم کا دین اور نسب ہے۔ جو بھی ان کے دین یا نسب پر حملہ کرے وہ دراصل رسول اللہ کے دین اور نسب پر حملہ کر رہا ہے۔
ur.seo_question: حضرت علی نے اپنے دین اور نسب کے بارے میں نبی کریم سے تعلق پر کیا فرمایا؟

tr.summary: Hz. Ali (a.s.), dininin ve soyunun Hz. Peygamber'in (s.a.v.s.) dini ve soyu ile aynı olduğunu beyan etmiştir.
tr.seo_question: Hz. Ali dini ve soyu hakkında Peygamber ile bağlantısını nasıl açıklamıştır?

fa.summary: امام علی علیه السلام اعلام فرمود که دین و نسب او همان دین و نسب پیامبر اسلام است.

key_terms.حسب: حسب — نسب شریف، اصل و نسب

fa.seo_question: حضرت علی علیه السلام درباره دین و نسب خود در رابطه با پیامبر چه فرمودند؟

id.summary: Imam Ali (a.s.) menyatakan bahwa agama dan nasabnya sama dengan agama dan nasab Nabi Muhammad (s.a.w.s.).
id.seo_question: Apa yang dikatakan Imam Ali tentang agama dan nasabnya dalam hubungannya dengan Nabi?

bn.summary: ইমাম আলী (আ.) ঘোষণা করেন যে তাঁর ধর্ম ও বংশ নবী মুহাম্মাদ (সা.)-এর অভিন্ন।
bn.seo_question: নবীর সাথে সম্পর্কে ইমাম আলী তাঁর ধর্ম ও বংশ সম্পর্কে কী বলেছেন?

es.summary: El Imam Ali (P) declaró que su fe y linaje son los del Profeta Muhammad (BPD).
es.seo_question: ¿Qué dijo el Imam Ali sobre su religión y linaje en relación con el Profeta?

fr.summary: L'Imam Ali (P) a déclaré que sa foi et sa lignée sont celles du Prophète Muhammad (BSDLF).
fr.seo_question: Qu'a dit l'Imam Ali sur sa religion et sa lignée par rapport au Prophète ?

de.summary: Imam Ali (F) erklärte, dass sein Glaube und seine Abstammung mit denen des Propheten Muhammad identisch sind.
de.seo_question: Was sagte Imam Ali über seine Religion und Abstammung in Bezug auf den Propheten?

ru.summary: Имам Али (мир ему) заявил, что его вера и родословная тождественны вере и родословной Пророка Мухаммада (ДБАР).
ru.seo_question: Что сказал Имам Али о своей вере и происхождении в связи с Пророком?

zh.summary: 伊玛目阿里（愿主赐他平安）宣称，他的信仰和血统与先知穆罕默德的信仰和血统一致。
zh.seo_question: 伊玛目阿里关于他与先知的信仰和血统关系说了什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ نَصْرِ بْنِ مُزَاحِمٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ سَلَمَةَ بْنِ كُهَيْلٍ عَنْ أَبِي صَادِقٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ يَقُولُ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: دِينِي دِينُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَحَسَبِي حَسَبُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَمَنْ تَنَاوَلَ دِينِي وَحَسَبِي فَقَدْ تَنَاوَلَ دِينَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَحَسَبَهُ

narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely Abu al-Hasan Ali ibn Muhammad al-Katib, a teacher of al-Mufid.
Common name; likely Ahmad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ahmad, a Shia hadith transmitter.
Common kunya and name; precise identification uncertain.

narrators.known_identity: al-Husayn ibn Nasr ibn Muzahim al-Minqari, son of the historian Nasr ibn Muzahim

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to Nasr ibn Muzahim al-Minqari, identified by preceding narrator context.
narrators.known_identity: Nasr ibn Muzahim al-Minqari (d. 212 AH), famous early Shia historian and author of Waq'at Siffin

narrators.name_ar: أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ
narrators.name_en: Abu Abd al-Rahman Abdullah ibn Abd al-Malik
narrators.ambiguity_note: Identified by his kunya and full name; a lesser-known transmitter in Kufi hadith circles.
Son of the well-known Salama ibn Kuhayl; transmitted hadith from his father.

narrators.known_identity: Salama ibn Kuhayl al-Hadrami (d. 121 AH), a prominent Kufi tabi'i narrator and known Shia sympathizer
Abu Sadiq, a companion of Imam Ali (AS), known narrator of his sayings

narrators.name_ar: أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ
narrators.name_en: Amir al-Mu'minin Ali ibn Abi Talib
narrators.known_identity: Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (AS), the first Imam and fourth caliph (d. 40 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: May God bless him and his family and grant them peace
The religion of the Messenger of God

similar_content_hints.description: Narrations where Imam Ali (AS) asserts his unique connection to the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW), such as the hadith of manzila (You are to me as Harun was to Musa).
Hadiths in which the Prophet (SAWW) declares that harming Ali is the same as harming the Prophet.
Narrations about the shared lineage and familial bond between Imam Ali and the Prophet, including the brotherhood pact.
